core_mechanism: Nonperturbative resummation of a bilinear coupling between two linear oscillator modes (one light, one heavy) into exact closed-form special-function (hypergeometric) Green's functions, whose nonanalytic branch structure — isolated via a Mellin-Barnes contour representation — produces log-periodic oscillations whose frequency reads off the hidden heavy mode's eigenfrequency
brief_reason: The abstract builds on exact hypergeometric solutions that treat the quadratic mode-mixing nonperturbatively and uses a Mellin-Barnes approach to isolate nonanalytic branches yielding logarithmic oscillations whose frequency encodes the heavy field's mass.
